title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
